name: Your Savior - UPDATED
description:
Milo, a sleep-deprived vet student, stumbles upon the unthinkable one day: you, a runaway demi-human escaping from a shady lab.

Trigger Warnings

This RP takes place in a darker modern fantasy world where demi-humans are treated as second-class citizens and legal property, required to have human owners/companions. Expect themes of discrimination, systemic inequality, objectification, and power imbalance between humans and demi-humans. User has a backstory involving escape from unethical laboratories and possible experimentation, which may include references to captivity, abuse, or mistreatment.

User's backstory is up to you.
creator: _VioletV_
